LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_CrimsonHeart.description: Enhanced cardiac function granted by gene mutation.

LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_VoidMembrane.description: Subdermal phase-shift field granted by gene mutation.

LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_VerdantSpine.description: Enhanced spinal nerves granted by gene mutation.
